song.title: Every Move I Make I make with you Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] Every move I make I make in You You make me move, Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You
[V2] Every step I take I take in You You are my way, Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You (2x)
[C] La-La-La-La-La La-La-La-La-La (2x)
[B] Waves of mercy Waves of grace Everywhere I look I see Your face Your love has captured me Oh my God, this love How can it be?
